HH«fl^ 3ft «t|l4HjS ^ N R PblHH ^faf — W 2 ! 2. ^.arffcHJ^Ml flobld TPW ^ ^TPI.'#ft I [ T O * . 820/11/2003 ^ s n f ^ r s H h r ^ ] 3?f*ffi **|UUH» ^T *lftM TO Rlu*un :—m^T.pT, 838(31), f^HJ* 8 H3*«K, 2001 ^*Hf*K£«HI HTOT % <W*M (^'HI*1K«0 % *im II, ^BT^S"3, ^T-T3«^ (1) ftii* 8, H«M<, 2001 *f M4>llVW 1 ^ *fr I MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Revenue) NOTIFICATION NewDeIhi,the22thDecernber,2003 G.S.R. 960(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by clause (a) of Section 9 of the Prevention of Illicit Traffic in Narcotic Drugs and Psychotropic Substances Act, 1988 (46 of 1988), and in supersession of the Notification of the 3787 GI/2003 CD -- 1 of 2 -- — _ _ — THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY , |PARTII—SEC.3(I)] Government of India in the Ministry of Finance (Departmentof Revenue) G.S.R. 838(E) dated 8th November, 2001, except as respects things done or omitted to be done before such supersession, the Central Government hereby constitutes an Advisory Board for a period of one year, consisting of :-r- (1) Hon'bleMr. JusticeB.A. Khan — Oiairman. (2) Hon'bleMr. JusticeMukuIMudgal -^ Member. (3) Hon'bleMr. JusticeSanjayKishanKaul — Member. 2. This notification shall come into force with immediate effect. [F. No. 820/11/2003-PrTNDPS] ANIL BAHUGUNA, Dy. Secy. Foot not e:—The Notification G. S.R 838(E), dated 8th November, 2001 was published in the Gazette of India (Extraordinary) Partll, Section3, Sub-section (i) on the 8th day of November, 2001.
